faqs.question: What pests are most common in Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Throgs Neck residents commonly deal with ants, roaches, spiders, mice, and occasional waterbugs due to the area's waterfront location. Seasonal issues include wasps in summer and rodents seeking warmth in fall and winter. Our general pest control service addresses all these common pests with targeted treatments.
